scripts.build: npm run install:client && npm run build:client && npm run install:server && npm run build:server && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function copyDir(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const src=path.join(s,f),dst=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(src).isDirectory()?copyDir(src,dst):fs.copyFileSync(src,dst)}}copyDir('client/dist','dbmsproject/server/dist/public')"
scripts.dev: echo 'Run client and server separately for development'
